zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnès, Mathilde de Trazegnies "Hacquegnies"於大約1200年出生在比利時海瑙特哈可聶斯時，她的父親Louis IV comte de Chiny29歲，母親Mahaut Mathilde II d'Avesnes31歲。她於1222年與Otton III de Trazegnies在比利時海瑙特特拉聶斯結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1230年8月享年31歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnès, Mathilde de Trazegnies "Hacquegnies"于大约1200年出生在比利时海瑙特哈可聶斯时，她的父亲Louis IV comte de Chiny29岁，母亲Mahaut Mathilde II d'Avesnes31岁。她于1222年与Otton III de Trazegnies在比利时海瑙特特拉聶斯结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1230年8月享年31岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Agnès,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

nameMeanings.name: Mathilde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Matilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

variants.name: Mechtilde
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnès, Mathilde de Trazegnies "Hacquegnies" was born about 1200, in Hacquegnies, Hainaut, Belgium, her father, Louis IV comte de Chiny, was 29 and her mother, Mahaut Mathilde II d'Avesnes, was 31. She married Otton III de Trazegnies in 1222, in Trazegnies, Hainaut, Belgium. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. She died in August 1230, at the age of 31.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnès, Mathilde de Trazegnies "Hacquegnies" est née environ 1200, à Hacquegnies, Hainaut, Belgique, son père, Louis IV comte de Chiny, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Mahaut Mathilde II d'Avesnes, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Otton III de Trazegnies en 1222, à Trazegnies, Hainaut, Belgique. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en août 1230, à l’âge de 31 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnès, Mathilde de Trazegnies "Hacquegnies" um 1200 in Hacquegnies, Hennegau, Belgien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Louis IV comte de Chiny 29 und ihre Mutter Mahaut Mathilde II d'Avesnes 31. Sie hat 1222 in Trazegnies, Hennegau, Belgien Otton III de Trazegnies geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb im August 1230 im Alter von 31 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnès, Mathilde de Trazegnies "Hacquegnies" è nata il circa 1200 nel Hacquegnies, Hainaut, Belgio, sua padre, Louis IV comte de Chiny, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Mahaut Mathilde II d'Avesnes, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Otton III de Trazegnies nel 1222, nel Trazegnies, Hainaut, Belgio. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel agosto 1230, all'età di 31 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnès, Mathilde de Trazegnies "Hacquegnies"が約1200年にベルギーヘイナトハククエグニーズで生まれた時，父Louis IV comte de Chinyは29歳，母Mahaut Mathilde II d'Avesnesは31歳であった。1222年にベルギーヘイナトトラズエグニーズでOtton III de Trazegniesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1230年8月に31歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnès, Mathilde de Trazegnies "Hacquegnies"(이)가 대략 1200년 벨기에 하인오트 하c크그니스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Louis IV comte de Chiny(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mahaut Mathilde II d'Avesnes(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1222년 벨기에 하인오트 트라즈그니스에서 Otton III de Trazegnies(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1230년 8월 31세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnès, Mathilde de Trazegnies "Hacquegnies" nasceu aproximadamente 1200, em Hacquegnies, Hainaut, Bélgica, seu pai, Louis IV comte de Chiny, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Mahaut Mathilde II d'Avesnes, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Otton III de Trazegnies em 1222, em Trazegnies, Hainaut, Bélgica. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em agosto de 1230, com 31 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnès, Mathilde de Trazegnies "Hacquegnies" родилась около 1200 г. в местности хаккуегниесь, ханаут, Бельгия, её отцу по имени Louis IV comte de Chiny было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Mahaut Mathilde II d'Avesnes, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Otton III de Trazegnies в 1222 г. в местности тразегниесь, ханаут, Бельгия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла август 1230 г. в возрасте 31 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnès, Mathilde de Trazegnies "Hacquegnies" nació aproximadamente 1200, en Hacquegnies, Hainaut, Bélgica, su papá, Louis IV comte de Chiny, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Mahaut Mathilde II d'Avesnes, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Otton III de Trazegnies en 1222, en Trazegnies, Hainaut, Bélgica. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en agosto de 1230, a la edad de 31 años.
